_comment: Recommended MLX distillation config for M3 Max (36 GB unified memory). Run with: python scripts/run_distillation_agent.py --config configs/mlx_recommended.json --open
_why_ce_alpha_0.2: Higher CE weight (vs 0.1) stabilises early training on small datasets without losing KD signal
_why_grad_acc_8: Effective batch = 2 × 8 = 16. Smoother gradients than grad_acc=4 with minimal speed cost
_why_topk_50: Top-50 logits capture >99% of teacher probability mass (~300 MB cached vs ~300 GB full vocab). Teacher is freed from memory after precompute.
_why_lora_r_16: Matches PyTorch backend capacity. Enough for Qwen2-0.5B student to absorb 1.5B teacher distribution
_why_epochs_3: MLX forward-KL converges reliably; 3 epochs vs 2 gives measurably lower final eval_ppl without significant overfitting on 2000 samples
